lineup_source: Belgium vs Iran, Group G, 21 June 2026 (4-3-3-ish midfield diamond)

players.name: Thibaut Courtois
players.note: Born in Bree; father Thierry is Walloon, mother Gitte (née Lambrechts) is Flemish, both former volleyball players.

players.name: Thomas Meunier
players.note: Born in Sainte-Ode, Belgian Ardennes; raised by his Belgian mother after his parents divorced, no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Nathan Ngoy
players.note: Born in Brussels (Molenbeek) to parents with ties to the Democratic Republic of the Congo; holds Belgian and DRC dual citizenship.

players.name: Brandon Mechele
players.note: Born in Bredene, West Flanders; no documented heritage beyond his Belgian surname and upbringing.

players.name: Maxim De Cuyper
players.note: Born in Knokke-Heist; father Fred De Cuyper played local football at KFC Heist, a Belgian family.

players.name: Nicolas Raskin
players.note: Born in Liège; son of Thierry Raskin, a former Belgian professional footballer.

players.name: Youri Tielemans
players.note: Born in Sint-Pieters-Leeuw; father is Flemish Belgian, mother is Congolese, both judo instructors.

players.name: Alexis Saelemaekers
players.note: Born in Sint-Agatha-Berchem, Brussels; father Romelu runs a grocery store chain, no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Kevin De Bruyne
players.note: Born in Drongen, Ghent; father Herwig is Belgian, mother Anna was born in Burundi to Flemish parents working abroad before the family settled in Belgium.

players.name: Leandro Trossard
players.note: Born in Maasmechelen, Limburg, to Peter Trossard and Linda Scheepers, both Belgian.

players.name: Romelu Lukaku
players.note: Born in Antwerp to a Congolese immigrant family; father Roger Lukaku was a Zaire/DR Congo international footballer.
